name: le-stage-audit
description: Audits deals for velocity problems, missing fields, and pipeline health issues that distort forecast and hide risk.

checks.label: Deals missing close date
checks.why: A deal with no close date can't appear in forecast and has no urgency signal for the rep. This is the most common source of forecast blindspots.
checks.fix: Add a close date — required for accurate forecasting

checks.label: Deals missing amount
checks.why: Deals without a dollar value can't contribute to pipeline coverage or quota attainment calculations. They make your forecast look smaller than it is.
checks.fix: Add a deal value — required for pipeline and forecast accuracy

checks.label: Deals with no associated contact
checks.why: Deals with no contact are orphaned — no one to email, no activity tracking, no influence mapping. They'll stall invisibly.
checks.fix: Associate at least one contact with this deal

checks.label: Deals stuck in stage for 30+ days
checks.why: Stalled deals inflate pipeline coverage without real probability of closing. No stage movement after 30 days is a clear stall signal.
checks.fix: Review this deal — no stage movement in 30+ days indicates a stall
checks.note: Value is computed at runtime: Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000

checks.label: Deals past their close date
checks.why: Past-close deals are the single biggest source of forecast inflation. Reps roll them forward indefinitely. Every one is either dead or needs a date update.
checks.fix: Update the close date or mark as closed lost
